raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":1.0,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"The artifact foregrounds two explicit contribution claims — a training protocol and a 'first calibration' of expert detection accuracy — plus a gap statement about prior reliance on execution-match; these require inspection under any plausible reading of 'check'.","R1.2":"The artifact contains a chain of statistical inferences (mixed-effects model design, CI bands, p < 0.001 significance claim, inference from chance-level to post-training accuracy); logical and statistical consistency is the most directly checkable element and is load-bearing.","R1.3":"Three quantitative claims (52.8% baseline, 71.4% post-training, κ ≈ 0.41 from prior work) must align with the described study design, sample size, and model specification; misalignment here would invalidate the delegation."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should 'check' be scoped to statistical and logical correctness (experimental design, CI plausibility, model validity, evidence-claim alignment), or do you want a full editorial review that additionally covers writing quality, citation accuracy, and novelty relative to prior work?"}

rationale.R1.1: The artifact foregrounds two explicit contribution claims — a training protocol and a 'first calibration' of expert detection accuracy — plus a gap statement about prior reliance on execution-match; these require inspection under any plausible reading of 'check'.
rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains a chain of statistical inferences (mixed-effects model design, CI bands, p < 0.001 significance claim, inference from chance-level to post-training accuracy); logical and statistical consistency is the most directly checkable element and is load-bearing.
rationale.R1.3: Three quantitative claims (52.8% baseline, 71.4% post-training, κ ≈ 0.41 from prior work) must align with the described study design, sample size, and model specification; misalignment here would invalidate the delegation.

parsed.clarification_question: Should 'check' be scoped to statistical and logical correctness (experimental design, CI plausibility, model validity, evidence-claim alignment), or do you want a full editorial review that additionally covers writing quality, citation accuracy, and novelty relative to prior work?
